item.title: Ft. Sensor dust âś¨ itâ€™s a long unfortunate story. Anyways I c...
item.description:
View on TikTok


Ft. Sensor dust âś¨ itâ€™s a long unfortunate story. Anyways I could eat the entire dish, this was a 10/10 Ingredients: -18-20 jumbo shells -15oz ricotta cheese -2/3c grated parm -2/3c grated low moisture mozzarella -1 egg -1tbsp chopped basil, 1tsp dried oregano, chili flakes -salt, pepper -sautĂ©ed veggies: 2 diced squashes (I did zucchini and yellow, 1/2 white onion, kernels from 1 ear of corn, 3 minced garlic cloves) -25oz marinara sauce (I used summer lemon flavor! Highly recommend with this) -get a fun summer wine to pair with! I had a delish skin contact one :) Recipe: -on med heat add 1tbsp oil, onions, and salt. SautĂ© until softened, add zucchini, corn and garlic and cook until slightly golden (5-10ish min) stir occasionally. Set aside and let cool slightly -cook jumbo noodles according to package (~14 min). Donâ€™t undercook them, it doesnâ€™t cook much in the sauce. Toss in oil after so they donâ€™t stick together when assembling. -in a bowl mix together ricotta, mozzarella, Parmesan, egg, basil, oregano, chili flakes, and salt and pepper. Fold in sautĂ©ed veggies **I eyeballed this but the measurements above should get you to a good spot lmaoo you canâ€™t really mess this up, if its too â€śliquidyâ€ť add more shredded cheese -preheat oven to 425F -pour sauce into a 9x16 dish, fill shells with about 2tbsp of the mixture and layer in the sauce. Cover in extra shredded cheese and foil. -Bake for 15 min, remove foil and bake for another 10 min until sauce and cheese is bubbling! -top with parm, lemon zest and basil đźŚĽ
@SAUZ

item.title:
Elote will be my go-to way to elevate corn this summer! Â
Â...
item.description:
View on TikTok


Elote will be my go-to way to elevate corn this summer! Â  Â Prep, Cook and recrisped all in the Ninja CrispiÂ Recipe below! Ingredients: -2-4 ears of cornÂ  -avocado oil -sauce: equal parts mayo and mexican crema (or sub sour cream), lime juice, grated garlic, salt (taste and adjust to your liking) -cotija cheese -paprika and ancho chili powderÂ  -cilantroÂ  Recipe:Â  -cover the corn in oil and salt. add to Ninja Crispi and airfry for 12-15 min, flip halfway. ****Conveniently chicken thighs cook for about the same amount of time, so I threw some in that had been marinating in a bbq mixture.Â  -while it's cooking, mix together sauce ingredients -once the corn has cooled slightly, brush on the sauce and cover in cotija cheese. sprinkle paprika and ancho chili powder, add cilantro!Â  -enjoy immediately, and thank me later!! :)Â  **store sauce, cotija cheese, and corn separately. When ready to eat the leftovers use the re-crisp option on the Ninja Crispi for 5-8 minutes. assemble elote and enjoy (again hehe)Â 
@Ninja Kitchen #NinjaPartner #NinjaCrispi

item.title: SURF & SNACK DAY!! Ingredients listed below :) I think this ...
item.description:
View on TikTok


SURF & SNACK DAY!! Ingredients listed below :) I think this is my 5th day trying to surf and I might have a new hobby đź‘€ Wrap: tortilla, chipotle mayo, sliced smoked turkey, spinach, havarti cheese â€” roll and slice Veggie sandwich: avocado w/ salt and pepper, whipped cream cheese, cucumber, sliced pepperoncinis, sprouts Ham & cheese: Dijon, butter, ham, cheddar cheese, turkey Caprese: tomato with salt, basil, mozzarella, prosciutto, balsamic glaze **I cut off the bread crust and sliced them all in half! Fruit salad: pineapple, mango, watermelon, strawberries, and lime (RIP my mini tajin bottle, you wouldâ€™ve made this perfect and adorableâ€¦ next time :â€™))
